overview.label: Palette
overview.value: 31 twelve-step scales — 6 tinted grays + 25 hues — each hand-tuned separately for light and dark, with alpha, P3 and P3-alpha variants
overview.note: Every step has a documented role: 1-2 app backgrounds, 3-5 component states, 6-8 borders, 9-10 solid backgrounds, 11-12 text. P3 variants are not shown on this page.

overview.label: Generation
overview.value: Hand-authored static tables; hosted custom-palette tool (closed)
overview.note: The repo ships literal values with no generation code; releases describe wholesale manual reworks ('a complete rework of all colors' in 2.0 and 3.0).

overview.label: Color space
overview.value: sRGB hex + 8-digit hex alpha; full P3 via color(display-p3) scale variants
overview.note: Authoring space unpublished. Radix Themes gates P3 values behind @supports + @media (color-gamut: p3).

overview.label: Contrast
overview.value: APCA by construction — steps 11/12 guaranteed Lc 60/90 on a step-2 background
overview.note: The guarantee lives in the hand-tuned values; no audit tooling, no WCAG 2.x language. Five bright hues (sky, mint, lime, yellow, amber) flip to dark foreground text on step 9.

overview.label: Theming
overview.value: Runtime CSS custom properties — .light/.dark class switch + [data-accent-color] attributes
overview.note: OS sync is explicitly delegated to next-themes ('Do not try to set <Theme appearance={resolvedTheme}>').

overview.label: Naming
overview.value: kebab-case — --{scale}-{step}, 'a' infix for alpha (--blue-a9); role scales --accent-* / --gray-* / --focus-*

overview.label: Token scope
overview.value: Color, space, radius, shadows, typography, per-component cursors, global scaling
overview.note: No motion, breakpoint, z-index or opacity tokens; breakpoints exist only as responsive prop syntax.

layers.name: role scales (accent/gray remapping)
layers.note: Whole scales remapped step-for-step, step semantics intact; includes the dedicated --focus-1..12 scale.

layers.name: functional tokens
layers.note: A thin purpose-named layer; components mostly consume role scales directly.

ramps.name: blackA
ramps.note: mode-invariant (same value in light and dark)

ramps.name: whiteA
ramps.note: mode-invariant (same value in light and dark)

tokenGroups.name: Functional tokens
tokenGroups.note: Purpose-named tokens on top of the role scales.

tokens.name: --color-transparent
tokens.note: same expression both modes; P3 override exists under @supports/@media color-gamut:p3, skipped (P3 excluded)

tokens.name: --focus-1..12 / --focus-a1..a12
tokens.note: focus scale mirrors the active accent scale 1:1; applied on .radix-themes and any non-gray [data-accent-color]

tokens.name: --accent-contrast (blue default)
tokens.note: text/icon color placed on top of accent-9 solid fills; shown for the default blue accent

tokens.name: --accent-surface (blue default)
tokens.note: translucent tinted surface for Soft/Surface variants; P3 override exists, skipped

tokens.name: --accent-indicator (blue default)
tokens.note: solid color used for indicators (checkboxes, switches, etc.)

tokens.name: --accent-track (blue default)
tokens.note: solid color used for slider/progress tracks

tokenGroups.name: Role scales
tokenGroups.note: The chosen accent and gray are remapped step-for-step onto --accent-1..12 / --gray-1..12 / --focus-1..12.

tokens.name: --accent-1
tokens.note: shown for the default blue accent

tokens.name: --accent-a9
tokens.note: representative alpha step; shown for the default blue accent

tokens.name: --focus-8
tokens.ref: var(--accent-8) (= var(--blue-8) for the default blue accent)
tokens.note: focus ring color mirrors accent-8 for the active accent

tokens.name: --gray-9 (mauve remap example)
tokens.note: --gray-1..12 / --gray-a1..a12 / --gray-contrast / --gray-surface / --gray-indicator / --gray-track are remapped step-for-step onto whichever neutral family (mauve, slate, sage, olive, sand, or gray itself) is selected via [data-gray-color]

focus.label: Color
focus.value: --focus-8 — a full --focus-1..12 scale remapped from the accent scale
focus.note: A 12-step ramp maintained purely so focus rings can re-point independently of accent; matches the scale docs assigning step 8 to focus rings.

focus.label: Visibility
focus.note: Touch devices get a separate affordance: an 0.5em outline of --accent-a4 on :active for coarse pointers.

contrast.label: step 11 text on step 2 background
contrast.note: Documented for every scale; shown here on blue.

contrast.label: step 12 text on step 2 background
contrast.note: Documented for every scale; shown here on blue.

contrast.label: step 11 text on step 2 background
contrast.note: Documented for every scale; shown here on blue.

contrast.label: step 12 text on step 2 background
contrast.note: Documented for every scale; shown here on blue.
